name: disk-usage
description: Report current disk usage once at session start. Output is prefixed with a [monitor:disk-usage] marker so the silently-injected context is identifiable.

name: memory-usage
description: Report current memory usage once at session start (Linux or macOS). Output is prefixed with a [monitor:memory-usage] marker.

name: git-status
command: echo '[monitor:git-status]'; { git status --short 2>/dev/null || echo 'not a git repo'; }
description: Report uncommitted git changes once at session start. Output is prefixed with a [monitor:git-status] marker.
